requirement_topic.en: Photobiological Safety — Blue Light Hazard (NTE INEN / IEC 62471 Risk Groups)
requirement_topic.zh: 光生物安全——蓝光危害（NTE INEN / IEC 62471 危险组别）
requirement_topic.zht: 光生物安全——藍光危害（NTE INEN / IEC 62471 危險組別）

summary.en: Photobiological safety of LED light sources in Ecuador is addressed through the NTE INEN adoption of IEC 62471 (Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems), where referenced by the applicable RTE INEN lighting regulation or the conformity-assessment scope. IEC 62471 classifies products into risk groups RG0 (exempt) through RG3 (high risk) based on blue-light-weighted radiance and irradiance. Unlike the EU, Ecuador does not embed photobiological classification in a binding Ecodesign-style regulation with mandatory label declaration for all products; whether a risk-group assessment must be supplied for the Certificate of Conformity depends on the specific RTE INEN regulation and conformity-assessment body scope. Where required, the IEC 62471 risk-group assessment forms part of the conformity dossier, and higher-risk groups (RG2/RG3) warrant warnings and usage restrictions.
summary.zh: 厄瓜多尔对 LED 光源光生物安全的处理，是通过 NTE INEN 对 IEC 62471（灯和灯系统的光生物安全）的采用，在适用的 RTE INEN 照明法规或合格评定范围引用时适用。IEC 62471 依据蓝光加权辐亮度和辐照度将产品分为 RG0（豁免）至 RG3（高危险）危险组别。与欧盟不同，厄瓜多尔未将光生物分类嵌入具约束力的生态设计式法规并对所有产品强制标签声明；是否须为符合性证书提供危险组别评估，取决于具体 RTE INEN 法规及合格评定机构范围。在要求时，IEC 62471 危险组别评估属于符合性档案的一部分，较高危险组别（RG2/RG3）须附警告及使用限制。
summary.zht: 厄瓜多爾對 LED 光源光生物安全的處理，是通過 NTE INEN 對 IEC 62471（燈和燈系統的光生物安全）的採用，在適用的 RTE INEN 照明法規或合格評定範圍引用時適用。IEC 62471 依據藍光加權輻亮度和輻照度將產品分為 RG0（豁免）至 RG3（高危險）危險組別。與歐盟不同，厄瓜多爾未將光生物分類嵌入具約束力的生態設計式法規並對所有產品強制標籤聲明；是否須為符合性證書提供危險組別評估，取決於具體 RTE INEN 法規及合格評定機構範圍。在要求時，IEC 62471 危險組別評估屬於符合性檔案的一部分，較高危險組別（RG2/RG3）須附警告及使用限制。

standards_or_laws: NTE INEN-IEC 62471 — Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems (Ecuadorian adoption of IEC 62471, where referenced)
RTE INEN lighting technical regulation — scope determines whether a risk-group assessment is required for the Certificate of Conformity

summary.en: China has adopted GB/T 20145 (Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems), technically equivalent to IEC 62471. GB/T 20145 is a recommended (GB/T = tuijian) standard and is not universally mandatory for all LED luminaires in the Chinese market; enforcement for residential products is limited. The risk-group framework (RG0–RG3) is shared with the IEC base, so a risk-group assessment produced for China provides a technically comparable starting point, though it is not automatically recognized in Ecuador's conformity process.
summary.zh: 中国已采用 GB/T 20145（灯和灯系统的光生物安全），技术上等同于 IEC 62471。GB/T 20145 为推荐性（GB/T = 推荐）标准，并非对所有中国市场 LED 灯具均强制，居民产品的执行力度有限。其危险组别框架（RG0–RG3）与 IEC 基础一致，故为中国出具的危险组别评估提供技术上可比的起点，但不自动被厄瓜多尔符合性流程所认可。
summary.zht: 中國已採用 GB/T 20145（燈和燈系統的光生物安全），技術上等同於 IEC 62471。GB/T 20145 為推薦性（GB/T = 推薦）標準，並非對所有中國市場 LED 燈具均強制，居民產品的執行力度有限。其危險組別框架（RG0–RG3）與 IEC 基礎一致，故為中國出具的危險組別評估提供技術上可比的起點，但不自動被厄瓜多爾符合性流程所認可。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 20145 — Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems (SAC/SAMR — recommended standard, aligned with IEC 62471)

gap.en: Both Ecuador (NTE INEN-IEC 62471) and China (GB/T 20145) build on IEC 62471, so the risk-group framework and test method are technically harmonized. The differences are regulatory: (1) in the EU, photobiological classification is a binding Ecodesign obligation for all regulated light sources; in Ecuador it is required only where the applicable RTE INEN regulation or conformity-assessment scope calls for it — confirm per product; (2) China's GB/T 20145 is recommended-only, so a Chinese-market product may have no formal risk-group assessment on file, and one may need to be produced for Ecuador where required; (3) where required for the Certificate of Conformity, the assessment must be in the conformity dossier (commonly Spanish), and RG2/RG3 products need warnings and usage restrictions. The shared IEC base means existing IEC 62471 test data may be reusable subject to the conformity-assessment body's acceptance.
gap.zh: 厄瓜多尔（NTE INEN-IEC 62471）与中国（GB/T 20145）均以 IEC 62471 为基础，危险组别框架与试验方法技术上协调。差异在监管层面：（1）在欧盟，光生物分类是对所有受管制光源具约束力的生态设计义务；在厄瓜多尔，仅在适用 RTE INEN 法规或合格评定范围要求时才需要——须逐产品确认；（2）中国 GB/T 20145 仅为推荐性，故中国市场产品可能无正式危险组别评估存档，在厄瓜多尔要求时可能须重新出具；（3）在符合性证书要求时，评估须纳入符合性档案（通常为西班牙语），RG2/RG3 产品须附警告及使用限制。共同的 IEC 基础意味着现有 IEC 62471 检测数据在合格评定机构接受时可重复使用。
gap.zht: 厄瓜多爾（NTE INEN-IEC 62471）與中國（GB/T 20145）均以 IEC 62471 為基礎，危險組別框架與試驗方法技術上協調。差異在監管層面：（1）在歐盟，光生物分類是對所有受管制光源具約束力的生態設計義務；在厄瓜多爾，僅在適用 RTE INEN 法規或合格評定範圍要求時才需要——須逐產品確認；（2）中國 GB/T 20145 僅為推薦性，故中國市場產品可能無正式危險組別評估存檔，在厄瓜多爾要求時可能須重新出具；（3）在符合性證書要求時，評估須納入符合性檔案（通常為西班牙語），RG2/RG3 產品須附警告及使用限制。共同的 IEC 基礎意味著現有 IEC 62471 檢測數據在合格評定機構接受時可重複使用。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — a photobiological risk-group assessment (NTE INEN-IEC 62471) is required only where the applicable RTE INEN lighting regulation or conformity-assessment scope calls for it; Ecuador has no EU-style universal binding photobiological-declaration mandate
mandatory_status.cn: Recommended — GB/T 20145 is a recommended (non-mandatory) standard; enforcement for residential luminaires is limited

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Photobiological risk-group classification in Ecuador rests on the NTE INEN adoption of IEC 62471 and is required only where the applicable RTE INEN regulation or conformity-assessment scope calls for it — there is no EU-style universal binding mandate, so confirm per product. The IEC 62471 risk-group framework is shared with China's recommended GB/T 20145, so existing IEC 62471 data may be reusable subject to the conformity-assessment body's acceptance. Where required, include the assessment in the Certificate of Conformity dossier and add warnings for RG2/RG3 products.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 厄瓜多尔的光生物危险组别分类基于 NTE INEN 对 IEC 62471 的采用，仅在适用 RTE INEN 法规或合格评定范围要求时才需要——无欧盟式普遍约束性强制，故须逐产品确认。其 IEC 62471 危险组别框架与中国推荐性 GB/T 20145 一致，故现有 IEC 62471 数据在合格评定机构接受时可重复使用。在要求时，将评估纳入符合性证书档案，并为 RG2/RG3 产品添加警告。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 厄瓜多爾的光生物危險組別分類基於 NTE INEN 對 IEC 62471 的採用，僅在適用 RTE INEN 法規或合格評定範圍要求時才需要——無歐盟式普遍約束性強制，故須逐產品確認。其 IEC 62471 危險組別框架與中國推薦性 GB/T 20145 一致，故現有 IEC 62471 數據在合格評定機構接受時可重複使用。在要求時，將評估納入符合性證書檔案，並為 RG2/RG3 產品添加警告。

requirement_topic.en: Blue Light Hazard Information on Label vs EU Mandatory Class
requirement_topic.zh: 标签上的蓝光危害信息与欧盟强制等级对比
requirement_topic.zht: 標籤上的藍光危害信息與歐盟強制等級對比

summary.en: Ecuador does not have an EU-style mandatory requirement to print a plain-language blue-light hazard class on every lighting product label (the EU obligation under Delegated Reg 2019/2015 Annex VI). In Ecuador, any photobiological-safety labelling or warning derives from the underlying NTE INEN-IEC 62471 risk-group assessment and the requirements of the applicable RTE INEN regulation, rather than a standalone blue-light-class label mandate. Practically, RG2 or higher products should carry appropriate warnings and usage information (in Spanish) per the safety standard and good practice, but a dedicated EU-style blue-light-class field on the energy label is not a general Ecuadorian requirement. Confirm the specific labelling and warning expectations with the conformity-assessment body for the product category.
summary.zh: 厄瓜多尔没有欧盟式在每个照明产品标签上印制通俗语言蓝光危害等级的强制要求（即欧盟授权法规 2019/2015 附件 VI 的义务）。在厄瓜多尔，任何光生物安全标签或警告均来自底层 NTE INEN-IEC 62471 危险组别评估及适用 RTE INEN 法规的要求，而非独立的蓝光等级标签强制。实务上，RG2 及以上产品应按安全标准及良好实践附带适当警告及使用信息（西班牙语），但能效标签上专门的欧盟式蓝光等级栏位并非厄瓜多尔的普遍要求。请就该产品类别与合格评定机构确认具体的标签及警告预期。
summary.zht: 厄瓜多爾沒有歐盟式在每個照明產品標籤上印製通俗語言藍光危害等級的強制要求（即歐盟授權法規 2019/2015 附件 VI 的義務）。在厄瓜多爾，任何光生物安全標籤或警告均來自底層 NTE INEN-IEC 62471 危險組別評估及適用 RTE INEN 法規的要求，而非獨立的藍光等級標籤強制。實務上，RG2 及以上產品應按安全標準及良好實踐附帶適當警告及使用信息（西班牙語），但能效標籤上專門的歐盟式藍光等級欄位並非厄瓜多爾的普遍要求。請就該產品類別與合格評定機構確認具體的標籤及警告預期。

standards_or_laws: NTE INEN-IEC 62471 — risk-group basis for any photobiological warning information (where referenced)
RTE INEN lighting technical regulation — labelling and warning requirements applicable to the product category

summary.en: China's mandatory China Energy Label (under GB 30255) does not include a blue-light hazard class, and GB/T 20145 (photobiological safety) is a recommended standard without a universal mandatory blue-light labelling requirement for residential luminaires. As a result, a typical Chinese-market LED product carries no blue-light hazard class on its packaging — the same practical starting point as Ecuador, which also has no EU-style mandatory blue-light-class label field.
summary.zh: 中国强制性中国能效标识（依据 GB 30255）不含蓝光危害等级，且 GB/T 20145（光生物安全）为推荐性标准，对居民灯具无普遍强制蓝光标签要求。因此，典型中国市场 LED 产品的包装上不带蓝光危害等级——这与同样没有欧盟式强制蓝光等级标签栏位的厄瓜多尔起点相同。
summary.zht: 中國強制性中國能效標識（依據 GB 30255）不含藍光危害等級，且 GB/T 20145（光生物安全）為推薦性標準，對居民燈具無普遍強制藍光標籤要求。因此，典型中國市場 LED 產品的包裝上不帶藍光危害等級——這與同樣沒有歐盟式強制藍光等級標籤欄位的厄瓜多爾起點相同。

standards_or_laws: GB 30255 — China Energy Label (no blue light hazard class)
GB/T 20145 — Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems (recommended standard, no universal mandatory blue-light label)

gap.en: Here Ecuador and China are practically aligned and both differ from the EU: neither imposes the EU's mandatory plain-language blue-light hazard class on the product label. For a Chinese exporter, this means the EU-specific blue-light-class label step is not a general Ecuadorian requirement, so it does not have to be added the way it must for the EU. However, the exporter should not assume zero obligation: (1) where the RTE INEN regulation or conformity-assessment body requires a photobiological risk-group assessment (see ledec-photobio-01), it must be produced; (2) RG2/RG3 products should carry Spanish-language warnings and usage information consistent with NTE INEN-IEC 62471 and good practice; (3) any safety marking must be in Spanish and meet Ecuadorian labelling rules. The net gap versus the EU is smaller, but the conformity-assessment body's specific labelling expectations should still be confirmed.
gap.zh: 在此厄瓜多尔与中国实务上一致，且二者均与欧盟不同：两者均未在产品标签上强制要求欧盟式通俗语言蓝光危害等级。对中国出口商而言，这意味着欧盟特有的蓝光等级标签步骤并非厄瓜多尔的普遍要求，故无需像欧盟那样添加。但出口商不应假设毫无义务：（1）在 RTE INEN 法规或合格评定机构要求光生物危险组别评估时（见 ledec-photobio-01），须予以出具；（2）RG2/RG3 产品应附带与 NTE INEN-IEC 62471 及良好实践一致的西班牙语警告及使用信息；（3）任何安全标志须为西班牙语并符合厄瓜多尔标签规则。相对欧盟的净差距较小，但仍应确认合格评定机构的具体标签预期。
gap.zht: 在此厄瓜多爾與中國實務上一致，且二者均與歐盟不同：兩者均未在產品標籤上強制要求歐盟式通俗語言藍光危害等級。對中國出口商而言，這意味著歐盟特有的藍光等級標籤步驟並非厄瓜多爾的普遍要求，故無需像歐盟那樣添加。但出口商不應假設毫無義務：（1）在 RTE INEN 法規或合格評定機構要求光生物危險組別評估時（見 ledec-photobio-01），須予以出具；（2）RG2/RG3 產品應附帶與 NTE INEN-IEC 62471 及良好實踐一致的西班牙語警告及使用信息；（3）任何安全標誌須為西班牙語並符合厄瓜多爾標籤規則。相對歐盟的淨差距較小，但仍應確認合格評定機構的具體標籤預期。

mandatory_status.target: Not generally required — Ecuador has no EU-style mandatory plain-language blue-light hazard class on the product label; any photobiological warning derives from the NTE INEN-IEC 62471 assessment and the applicable RTE INEN regulation
mandatory_status.cn: Not required — China Energy Label (GB 30255) does not include a blue light hazard class; GB/T 20145 imposes no universal mandatory blue-light label

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Unlike the EU, Ecuador does not mandate a plain-language blue-light hazard class on the product label, so this EU-specific labelling step is not a general Ecuadorian requirement — here Ecuador and China are practically aligned. The exporter must still produce a NTE INEN-IEC 62471 risk-group assessment where the applicable RTE INEN regulation or conformity-assessment body requires it, and RG2/RG3 products should carry Spanish-language warnings. Confirm the conformity-assessment body's specific labelling expectations for the product category before printing packaging.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 与欧盟不同，厄瓜多尔不强制在产品标签上标注通俗语言蓝光危害等级，故此欧盟特有的标签步骤并非厄瓜多尔普遍要求——在此厄瓜多尔与中国实务上一致。出口商仍须在适用 RTE INEN 法规或合格评定机构要求时出具 NTE INEN-IEC 62471 危险组别评估，且 RG2/RG3 产品应附带西班牙语警告。印制包装前请就该产品类别确认合格评定机构的具体标签预期。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 與歐盟不同，厄瓜多爾不強制在產品標籤上標註通俗語言藍光危害等級，故此歐盟特有的標籤步驟並非厄瓜多爾普遍要求——在此厄瓜多爾與中國實務上一致。出口商仍須在適用 RTE INEN 法規或合格評定機構要求時出具 NTE INEN-IEC 62471 危險組別評估，且 RG2/RG3 產品應附帶西班牙語警告。印製包裝前請就該產品類別確認合格評定機構的具體標籤預期。
